name: SAMVAAD
shortDescription: SAMVAAD is a wearable communication device that translates Indian Sign Language into text in real time, helping deaf and hard-of-hearing individuals communicate naturally with people who do not understand sign language.

applications.title: Schools
applications.description: Enabling deaf students to participate fully in classroom discussions and educational settings.

applications.title: Hospitals
applications.description: Facilitating clear communication between medical professionals and deaf patients.

applications.title: Offices
applications.description: Creating inclusive workplaces where deaf employees can communicate seamlessly.

applications.title: Government Services
applications.description: Ensuring deaf citizens have equal access to public services and facilities.

applications.title: Customer Support
applications.description: Empowering businesses to serve deaf customers with the same quality of service.

applications.title: Public Facilities
applications.description: Making public spaces accessible for the deaf community in everyday life.

applications.title: Accessibility Programs
applications.description: Supporting broader accessibility initiatives across communities and institutions.

hardware.name: Raspberry Pi
hardware.description: Central processing unit that runs the entire gesture recognition pipeline.

hardware.name: Camera Module
hardware.description: High-resolution camera capturing hand movements at 30fps for real-time analysis.

hardware.name: OLED Display
hardware.description: Compact display showing translated text output directly on the device.

hardware.name: Wearable Housing
hardware.description: Ergonomic, lightweight enclosure designed for comfortable extended wear.

timeline.description: Comprehensive study of Indian Sign Language, assistive technology, and user needs.
Ideation sessions, sketches, and architectural planning for the wearable system.
First working prototype validating core hardware and software integration.
Training gesture recognition models on a comprehensive ISL dataset.
Assembling all components into the wearable housing with optimized layout.
Extensive real-world testing with deaf community members and sign language experts.
Performance tuning, latency reduction, and accuracy improvements.
Production-ready prototype with polished hardware and refined software.
Showcase at national innovation exhibitions and accessibility conferences.

futureScope.title: Support for More Languages
futureScope.description: Expanding beyond Indian Sign Language to support regional and international sign languages.

futureScope.title: Offline Processing
futureScope.description: On-device inference for complete functionality without internet connectivity.

futureScope.title: Mobile Companion App
futureScope.description: iOS and Android application for extended functionality and personalization.

futureScope.title: Improved Battery Life
futureScope.description: Next-generation power management for multi-day usage on a single charge.

futureScope.title: SOS Safety Mode
futureScope.description: Emergency alert support for future wearable safety functionality.

futureScope.title: Expanded Gesture Library
futureScope.description: Growing the recognized gesture set to cover more complex expressions and sentences.

futureScope.title: Global Deployment
futureScope.description: Partnering with organizations worldwide to bring accessible communication to all.
